mod.kingdoms.name: Kingdoms
kingdoms.access_tool.not_member: Join a faction before using the Management Key.
kingdoms.access_tool.not_owned: You can only manage containers in your own territory.
kingdoms.chest.not_container: Look at a container in your territory.
kingdoms.chest.self: You always have access to your faction's containers.
kingdoms.chest.update_failed: That container's access could not be updated.
kingdoms.chest.not_listed: That player is not on this container's whitelist.
kingdoms.chest.nothing_to_clear: This container has no whitelisted players.
kingdoms.chest.added_inactive: Whitelisted %s; cycle the container to Whitelist with the Management Key to apply it.
kingdoms.chest.cleared: Cleared %s whitelisted player(s) from this container.
kingdoms.protection.no_break: You cannot break blocks in this faction claim.
kingdoms.protection.no_place: You cannot place blocks in this faction claim.
kingdoms.protection.no_interact: You cannot interact with blocks in this faction claim.
